notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. Deferred transparency QA (2026-05-08): alpha-sensitive candidate is RGB/no real alpha in probe samples; cleanup is required before review or integration gates can reopen.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat UI chrome pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate UI component sheet for combat frames, rails, slots, timer pieces, and dividers.
Subject: combat top bar frame, enemy panel frame, board frame, mastery rail, player vitals frame, equipment slot, consumable slot, timer track, divider strip, corner ornament.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, dark stone, blackened steel, antique gold trim, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet on neutral background, separated components with padding, no labels, no embedded text.
Lighting/mood: tactical, sturdy, restrained.
Color palette: charcoal stone, steel, gold, subtle blue/violet highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, no excessive ornament.
